2606.16910.title: IMPACTeen: Intentions, Manipulation, Persuasion, Annotations, and Consequences in Teen Communication Dataset
2606.16910.paper_summary: IMPACTeen is a dataset of textual social influence scenarios spanning interpersonal, media-based, and digital settings in an adolescent context. It contains 1,021 texts, 5,100 individual annotation records, and gold labels for social influence techniques, with each text annotated from five distinct perspectives: teenagers, parents, psychologists, communication experts, and teachers. The resource was constructed through constrained LLM generation, followed by a two-step human editing and validation phase aimed at ensuring youth-context realism. A multi-dimensional annotation covered influence presence, techniques, intentions, consequences, resistance, reactions, and annotation confidence. The dataset supports research on social influence detection, annotator disagreement, cross-lingual modeling, and the training and evaluation of language models. The dataset was created in Polish and is accompanied by a corresponding English version.
2606.16910.paper_summary_zh: IMPACTeen 是一個文本社會影響情境的數據集，涵蓋了青少年背景下的人際、媒體和數位環境。<lb/>它包含 1,021 篇文本、5,100 條個別註釋記錄，以及針對社會影響技術的金標籤，每篇文本從五個不同的角度進行註釋：青少年、父母、心理學家、傳播專家和教師。<lb/>該資源是通過受限的 LLM 生成構建的，隨後經過兩步的人類編輯和驗證階段，以確保青少年情境的真實性。<lb/>多維度的註釋涵蓋了影響的存在、技術、意圖、後果、抵抗、反應和註釋信心。<lb/>該數據集支持社會影響檢測、註釋者分歧、跨語言建模以及語言模型的訓練和評估的研究。<lb/>該數據集是用波蘭語創建的，並附有相應的英文版本。
2606.16910.author: Aleksander Szczęsny et.al.
2606.16910.authors: Aleksander Szczęsny, Wiktoria Mieleszczenko-Kowszewicz, Maciej Markiewicz, Beata Bajcar, Tomasz Adamczyk, Jolanta Babiak, Grzegorz Chodak, Przemysław Kazienko
